records.question: Which episodes have a number in series at most 204, a rating exactly 8.5, at least 199 votes, a related keyword record, and also have a related vote record with percent exactly 20.1 and votes exactly 40?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT episode.episode_id FROM episode
JOIN keyword ON episode.episode_id = keyword.episode_id
JOIN vote ON episode.episode_id = vote.episode_id
WHERE episode.number_in_series <= 204 AND episode.rating = 8.5 AND vote.percent = 20.1 AND episode.votes >= 199 AND vote.votes = 40
records.pred_sql:
SELECT
  T1.episode_id
FROM Episode AS T1
INNER JOIN Keyword AS T2
  ON T1.episode_id = T2.episode_id
INNER JOIN Vote AS T3
  ON T1.episode_id = T3.episode_id
WHERE
  T1.number_in_series <= 204 AND T1.rating = 8.5 AND T1.votes >= 199 AND T3.percent = 20.1 AND T3.votes = 40

records.question: Which episodes that have related keywords and credits have a number in the series at least 204 and an episode number at most 23?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT episode.episode_id FROM episode
JOIN keyword ON episode.episode_id = keyword.episode_id
JOIN credit ON episode.episode_id = credit.episode_id
WHERE episode.number_in_series >= 204 AND episode.episode <= 23
records.pred_sql: SELECT T1.episode_id FROM Episode AS T1 INNER JOIN Keyword AS T2 ON T1.episode_id = T2.episode_id INNER JOIN Credit AS T3 ON T1.episode_id = T3.episode_id WHERE T1.number_in_series >= 204 AND T1.episode <= 23

records.question: Which episodes titled Agony are part of the Law and Order series and have received awards involving any person?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT episode.episode_id FROM episode
JOIN award ON episode.episode_id = award.episode_id
JOIN person ON award.person_id = person.person_id
WHERE episode.title = 'Agony' AND episode.series = 'Law and Order'
records.pred_sql: SELECT DISTINCT T1.episode_id FROM Episode AS T1 INNER JOIN Award AS T2 ON T1.episode_id = T2.episode_id WHERE T1.title = 'Agony' AND T1.series = 'Law and Order' AND T2.person_id IS NOT NULL

records.question: Which episodes that have related keyword and award records have an episode image containing "224", belong to season 9, have the title exactly "Refuge: Part 1", have an episode number at most 23, have an award exactly "Best Television Episode", have an air date on or after 1999-05-26, have exactly 199 votes, and have a number in series at least 204?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT episode.episode_id FROM episode
JOIN keyword ON episode.episode_id = keyword.episode_id
JOIN award ON episode.episode_id = award.episode_id
WHERE episode.episode_image LIKE '%224%' AND episode.season = 9 AND episode.title = 'Refuge: Part 1' AND episode.episode <= 23 AND award.award = 'Best Television Episode' AND episode.air_date >= '1999-05-26' AND episode.votes = 199 AND episode.number_in_series >= 204
records.pred_sql: SELECT DISTINCT T1.episode_id FROM Episode AS T1 INNER JOIN Keyword AS T2 ON T1.episode_id = T2.episode_id INNER JOIN Award AS T3 ON T1.episode_id = T3.episode_id WHERE T1.episode_image LIKE '%224%' AND T1.season = 9 AND T1.title = 'Refuge: Part 1' AND T1.episode <= 23 AND T3.award = 'Best Television Episode' AND T1.air_date >= '1999-05-26' AND T1.votes = 199 AND T1.number_in_series >= 204

records.question: Which episodes of Law and Order titled Empire from season 9 or later, with episode number in series at least 201, were nominated by the Primetime Emmy Awards where the production mixer role is credited in the Law and Order series?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT episode.episode_id FROM episode
JOIN award ON episode.episode_id = award.episode_id
WHERE episode.title = 'Empire' AND award.role = 'production mixer' AND award.series = 'Law and Order' AND episode.season >= 9 AND award.organization = 'Primetime Emmy Awards' AND award.result = 'Nominee' AND episode.number_in_series >= 201 AND episode.series = 'Law and Order'
records.pred_sql: SELECT DISTINCT T1.episode_id FROM Episode AS T1 INNER JOIN Award AS T2 ON T1.episode_id = T2.episode_id INNER JOIN Credit AS T3 ON T1.episode_id = T3.episode_id WHERE T1.series = 'Law and Order' AND T1.title = 'Empire' AND T1.season >= 9 AND T1.number_in_series >= 201 AND T2.organization = 'Primetime Emmy Awards' AND T2.result = 'Nominee' AND T3.role = 'production mixer'

records.question: What episodes have an episode number of at most 10 and include credits?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT episode.episode_id FROM episode
JOIN credit ON episode.episode_id = credit.episode_id
WHERE episode.episode <= 10
records.pred_sql: SELECT T1.episode_id FROM Episode AS T1 INNER JOIN Credit AS T2 ON T1.episode_id = T2.episode_id WHERE T1.episode <= 10

records.question: Which episodes have the episode number exactly 18?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT episode.episode_id FROM episode
WHERE episode.episode = 18
records.pred_sql: SELECT episode_id FROM Episode WHERE episode = 18

records.question: Which episodes aired on or after 1998-11-18 have at least 183 votes and a vote percentage exactly equal to 13.1?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT episode.episode_id FROM episode
JOIN vote ON episode.episode_id = vote.episode_id
WHERE episode.air_date >= '1998-11-18' AND vote.percent = 13.1 AND episode.votes >= 183
records.pred_sql: SELECT T1.episode_id FROM Episode AS T1 INNER JOIN Vote AS T2 ON T1.episode_id = T2.episode_id WHERE T1.air_date >= '1998-11-18' AND T1.votes >= 183 AND T2.percent = 13.1

records.question: Which episodes of Law and Order titled Ramparts have a rating of 8.0 with at least 181 votes, appear in season 9 or earlier and episode 11 or earlier, have a number in series no more than 192, and include the specified episode image?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT episode.episode_id FROM episode
WHERE episode.episode_image LIKE '%https://m.media-amazon.com/images/M/MV5BNWY5ZWMwMTUtYjNhZS00YTY5LTlhMzctMTBhMmFhZThlYzg4XkEyXkFqcGdeQXVyMzkyOTQ0NzY@._V1_UY126_UX224_AL_.jpg%' AND episode.episode <= 11 AND episode.season <= 9 AND episode.rating = 8.0 AND episode.votes >= 181 AND episode.series = 'Law and Order' AND episode.number_in_series <= 192 AND episode.title = 'Ramparts'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT
  episode_id
FROM Episode
WHERE
  series = 'Law and Order' AND title = 'Ramparts' AND rating = 8.0 AND votes >= 181 AND season <= 9 AND episode <= 11 AND number_in_series <= 192 AND episode_image IS NOT NULL

records.question: Which episodes titled Hate aired on or before 1999-01-06, have at least 174 votes, and have episode numbers no more than 10 and number in series no more than 191?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT episode.episode_id FROM episode
WHERE episode.votes >= 174 AND episode.episode <= 10 AND episode.number_in_series <= 191 AND episode.title = 'Hate' AND episode.air_date <= '1999-01-06'
records.pred_sql: SELECT episode_id FROM Episode WHERE title = 'Hate' AND air_date <= '1999-01-06' AND votes >= 174 AND episode <= 10 AND number_in_series <= 191
